title: Python Logging SDK — Production-Grade Distributed Observability
description: A lightweight, plug-and-play Python Logging SDK that standardizes structured observability across AI/ML pipelines, distributed systems, and backend services. Automatic context injection (trace_id, request_id, span_id), sensitive data redaction, environment-aware config, and OpenTelemetry-compatible integration with Azure Monitor.

title: Language-Agnostic API & AI/ML E2E Testing Framework
description: A plug-and-play reliability engine for modern API and AI/ML systems. JSON-driven DSL, parallel execution, built-in observability with structured logs, traces, and SLA enforcement. Works across Python, .NET, and ML pipelines.

title: Local MCP Server — Personal DevOps & MLOps AI Assistant
description: A fully local Model Context Protocol server built with FastAPI and Phi-3 Mini (GPT4All). Understands natural language commands and executes DevOps/cloud tasks — no cloud, no API keys. Hybrid routing: keyword-fast for predictable tasks, LLM for flexible intent.

title: Local AI Billing Chat
description: Chat with your cloud billing data in plain language. Upload AWS or Azure CSVs and ask about cost changes, new services, and team breakdowns — fully local using Ollama, no data leaves your machine.

title: Local-First AI Knowledge Base
description: A unified local AI chat interface to query PDFs, Word files, PPTs, markdown, and notes entirely on-device. Powered by Gemma 4 (2B) via Ollama, ChromaDB vector search, and NetworkX knowledge graph — with hash-based incremental indexing. Zero cloud dependency.

title: AI Decision Engine — Mistral, FastAPI & PromptFlow
description: A dynamic decision engine that evaluates user data against JSON-defined rules and provides AI-driven reasoning using Mistral-7B-OpenOrca via GPT4All. Generates HTML & PDF reports, orchestrated with PromptFlow, deployed on Azure App Services with GPU support and full CI/CD via Bicep.
